svg.text: SHIFT = hold the bottom-left ▶ transport button · keep the hardware on its default layer (don't press the device's own SHIFT key)
button LED lights while active (mic live / recording+streaming)
shift: … = function while holding the bottom-left ▶ button
End-of-track warning: the M, S and R LEDs of strips 1–3 (deck 1) and 6–8 (deck 2) flash when a playing deck has <30 s left
Buttons marked with a dot (M/S of strips 4–5) keep their LED lit as a landmark for the crossfader; strip 5's still work as loop in / loop ÷2
